price: Manch eine Heerschar von den Gruppierungen wird da geschlagen stehen!
arabic: جُندٞ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهۡزُومٞ مِّنَ ٱلۡأَحۡزَابِ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: jundun mā hunālika mahzūmun mina al-aḥzābi
